Default is 60. * @return CreateAccessTokenOptions Options builder */ public static function create( string $factorFriendlyName = Values::NONE, int $ttl = Values::INT_NONE ): CreateAccessTokenOptions { return new CreateAccessTokenOptions( $factorFriendlyName, $ttl ); } } class CreateAccessTokenOptions extends Options { /** * @param string $factorFriendlyName The friendly name of the factor that is going to be created with this access token * @param int $ttl How long, in seconds, the access token is valid. Can be an integer between 60 and 300.
